card_description: Sergeant Kelly is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 8 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies the "Miracle of Transubstantiation" as the mechanism by which God sanctifies and replaces ordinary reality ("trash of the alley")."
